First Strike.desc: Free attack when enemy moves into reach

Improved First Strike.desc: First Strike applies to any foes entering reach

Extraction.desc: No free attacks when withdrawing from melee

Improved Extraction.desc: Can withdraw from multiple foes without free attacks

Counterattack.desc: Free Fighting attack if foe misses you by 1+ in melee

Frenzy.desc: One extra Fighting die against a single target

Improved Frenzy.desc: Two extra Fighting dice against a single target

Thief.requirements: Novice, Agility d8, Athletics d6, Lockpicking d6, Stealth d8

Woodsman.requirements: Novice, Spirit d6, Survival d8, Tracking d8

McGyver.requirements: Novice, Smarts d6, Notice d8, Repair d6
McGyver.desc: Can improvise tools and simple devices from spare parts

Command.desc: Allies in command range gain +1 Spirit to recover from Shaken

Inspire.desc: Success on Battle can remove Shaken from allies

Connections.desc: Has an insider contact in one organization who can provide occasional help
